ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station (e.g., CHIL) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was established */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the weather station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "ztd" REAL /* Zenith tropospheric delay (ZTD) */,
  "wet_delay" REAL /* Wet delay */,
  "hydrostatic_delay" REAL /* Hydrostatic delay */,
  "times" INTEGER /* Times (always 0 in the given data) */,
  "sig_ztd" REAL /* Signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of the ZTD measurement */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format used */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data type */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset (e.g., 0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the format (e.g., .csv, .json) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., tropospheric delay, hydrostatic delay) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type (e.g., meters, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the dataset */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format used */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data file (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_upload_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("upload_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the changes in this version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
